zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabeau de Renty於1335年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪時，她的父親Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem35歲，母親Marie de Brimeu33歲。她於大約1340年與Guillaume de Croy在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1377年5月10日享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabeau de Renty于1335年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪时，她的父亲Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem35岁，母亲Marie de Brimeu33岁。她于大约1340年与Guillaume de Croy在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1377年5月10日享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Renty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Renz   and, in North America, its altered form.

variants.name: Renslow
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Renzle, from a pet form of Rentz .

variants.name: Rentzel
meanings: habitational name from Renzel in Hanover.
from a pet form of the personal name   Rentz  .

variants.name: Renze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Josefina, Mercedes.
North German: archaic form of Rentz 1 (from Lorenz).

variants.name: Renz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Horst, Fritz, Hans, Kurt.
German: from the personal name Renz, a short form of Reinhard (see Reinhardt ) or Lorenz (see Lawrence ).
German: habitational name from any of several places called Renz or Rentz in Pomerania and the former East Prussia.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabeau de Renty was born in 1335, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem, was 35 and her mother, Marie de Brimeu, was 33. She married Guillaume de Croy about 1340, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 10 May 1377, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabeau de Renty est née en 1335, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marie de Brimeu, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Croy environ 1340, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1377, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabeau de Renty 1335 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem 35 und ihre Mutter Marie de Brimeu 33. Sie hat um 1340 in Frankreich Guillaume de Croy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1377 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Renty è nata il nel 1335 nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marie de Brimeu, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Croy circa 1340, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1377, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Rentyが1335年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイで生まれた時，父Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegemは35歳，母Marie de Brimeuは33歳であった。約1340年にフランスでGuillaume de Croyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1377年5月10日に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Renty(이)가 1335년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Brimeu(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 프랑스에서 Guillaume de Croy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 5월 10일 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Renty nasceu em 1335, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Brimeu, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Croy aproximadamente 1340, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1377, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabeau de Renty родилась в 1335 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Brimeu, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Croy около 1340 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 мая 1377 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabeau de Renty nació en 1335, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Heer Andreas de Renty, Heer van Renty en Senegem, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marie de Brimeu, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Croy aproximadamente 1340, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1377, a la edad de 42 años.
